action.reasoning: Observation: Evaluation of best_head.pt failed because predict.py loaded state_dict containing unexpected clip.* keys, suggesting the checkpoint structure is not what we assumed (head-only). We need to inspect the actual contents of best_head.pt to correctly adapt predict.py. Analysis: The error indicates the state_dict passed to FullModel had vision encoder keys, so either best_head.pt contains the full model or the extract_state_dict function picked the wrong inner dict. Inspecting the file will reveal its structure. Decision: Run a short Python command to inspect the checkpoint keys and sizes. Then in the next iteration, fix predict.py to robustly load head (or full model) accordingly and submit eval. No new files needed this iteration.
